task_summary: SP36 attempted to make product-named mew_wisp.py output files require explicit --format while preserving ghost.py historical HTML compatibility, but no product edits landed because the requested gpt-5.5 backend hit a usage limit before the first tool step.

tests_run.result: blocked before first edit with HTTP 429 usage_limit_reached; reset at 2026-05-05 14:32:30 JST
worktree clean after failed attempt; branch ahead only due latest origin/main merge

proof_artifacts: stdout final report showed stop_reason=model_error and HTTP 429 usage_limit_reached
notes: No product files were edited and no product-code rescue edits were made. The user requested gpt-5.5 as the implementation model, so the operator did not switch to another model. The --report persistence issue was confirmed again after pulling latest origin/main and recorded on issue #32.
